# truewatch_mute (Data Source)

The `truewatch_mute` data source reads an existing TrueWatch mute rule by `uuid` or exact `name`.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `creator` (String) Filter mute rules by creator when looking up by name.
- `is_enable` (String) Filter mute rules by enabled flag when looking up by name.
- `name` (String) The exact name of the mute rule.
- `type` (String) Mute rule type. When configured with name lookup, filters the mute list by type.
- `updator` (String) Filter mute rules by updator when looking up by name.
- `uuid` (String) The UUID of the mute rule.
- `work_status` (String) Filter mute rules by work status when looking up by name.

### Read-Only

- `create_at` (Number) The timestamp seconds of the resource created at.
- `crontab_duration` (Number) Repeated mute duration in seconds.
- `declaration` (Map of String) Custom declaration information.
- `description` (String) The description of the mute rule.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the mute rule is enabled. API status 0 maps to true, and status 2 maps to false.
- `end_time` (String) One-time mute end time.
- `filter_string` (String) Event attribute filter expression.
- `mute_ranges` (Attributes List) Mute ranges. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--mute_ranges))
- `notify_message` (String) Notification message.
- `notify_targets` (Attributes List) Notification targets for mute notifications. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--notify_targets))
- `notify_time_str` (String) Notification time.
- `repeat_crontab_set` (Attributes) Repeated mute crontab settings. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--repeat_crontab_set))
- `repeat_expire_time` (String) Repeated mute expiration time.
- `repeat_time_set` (Number) Whether the mute rule repeats.
- `start_time` (String) One-time mute start time.
- `status` (Number) Mute rule status returned by the API.
- `tags` (Map of List of String) Event attribute filters.
- `timezone` (String) Mute rule timezone.
- `update_at` (Number) The timestamp seconds of the resource updated at.
- `workspace_uuid` (String) The UUID of the workspace.

<a id="nestedatt--mute_ranges"></a>
### Nested Schema for `mute_ranges`

Read-Only:

- `alert_policy_uuid` (String) Alert policy UUID.
- `checker_uuid` (String) Monitor/checker UUID.
- `monitor_uuid` (String) Monitor UUID.
- `name` (String) The display name of the muted resource.
- `slo_uuid` (String) SLO UUID.
- `tag_uuid` (String) Monitor tag UUID.
- `type` (String) The muted resource type returned by the API.


<a id="nestedatt--notify_targets"></a>
### Nested Schema for `notify_targets`

Read-Only:

- `to` (List of String) Notification target UUIDs.
- `type` (String) Notification target type.


<a id="nestedatt--repeat_crontab_set"></a>
### Nested Schema for `repeat_crontab_set`

Read-Only:

- `day` (String) Day field.
- `hour` (String) Hour field.
- `min` (String) Minute field.
- `month` (String) Month field.
- `week` (String) Week field.
